positive: Synthwave aesthetic poster featuring a stylized chrome sports car driving towards a neon grid sunset. The colors are dominated by magenta, cyan, and electric blue. Retro 80s vaporwave style, geometric shapes, palm tree silhouettes, high contrast, digital painting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, grunge, dirt, realistic people, natural lighting, messy lines
